dashboard.noSnapshotData: No snapshot data yet. Snapshots are recorded daily.

chart.emptyIntraday: No intraday data yet. Snapshots are taken every 15 min during market hours.

twr.label: TWR (annualized)
twr.help: Your investing skill, independent of when you added or withdrew money.

xirr.label: XIRR
xirr.help: The real return after accounting for when you put money in and took it out.

maxDD.label: Max Drawdown
maxDD.help: The worst peak-to-trough drop your portfolio has ever taken.

holdings.title: Holdings
holdings.empty: No assets yet. Add one to see your holdings.

currencyExposure.title: Currency Exposure
currencyExposure.help: Shows how much of your wealth is denominated in each currency.

transactions.title: Cash Flow
transactions.notePlaceholder: Optional note, e.g. payroll, bonus, annual top-up...
transactions.helper: Record when you moved cash into or out of the portfolio. These flows power TWR and XIRR on the dashboard.

empty.title: No cash flows recorded yet
empty.hint: Add your first deposit or withdrawal to make TWR and XIRR meaningful.

form.description: Deposits add money to the portfolio; withdrawals remove money. Amount is always a positive number.

errors.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number

transactions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this cash flow record? This cannot be undone.

assetList.addFirstAsset: Add your first asset to start tracking your wealth.

assetForm.editDescription: Update the details of your asset.
assetForm.addDescription: Add a new asset to track.
assetForm.name: Name
assetForm.quantityError: Quantity must be a positive number
assetForm.costPriceError: Cost price must be a valid number
assetForm.manualPriceError: Manual price must be a valid number

assets.title: Assets
assets.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

history.title: History
history.snapshotsAutoCreated: Snapshots are created automatically at the end of each day.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearWarning: This will permanently delete all your assets, snapshots, and settings.
settings.clearConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This will remove all assets, snapshots, and settings. This action cannot be undone.

pollOnlyMarketOpen.label: Only refresh during market hours
pollOnlyMarketOpen.help: When off, prices are refreshed on the chosen cadence even when markets are closed, which consumes more API quota.

snapshotInterval.label: Intraday snapshot cadence
snapshotInterval.help: Creates a snapshot during market hours. Older than 90 days are pruned automatically.

demoMode.overwriteConfirm: You have {{count}} real asset(s) saved. Entering demo mode will wipe them. Continue?

exitBanner.text: You're exploring a demo portfolio. Data isn't real.

onboarding.subtitle: Let's add your first asset — it only takes a minute.
onboarding.tryDemo: I just want to explore first (load sample data)
onboarding.tryDemoConfirm: This will load 20 sample assets so you can explore the app. You can exit demo anytime — your own data won't be affected.

step1.title: What would you like to add first?
step1.subtitle: Pick the category that best matches your asset. You can always add more later.

step3.title: Looks good?
step3.subtitle: Review and confirm to create your portfolio.

errors.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be a positive number
errors.priceInvalid: Price must be a valid number
errors.submitFailed: Couldn't create asset. Please try again.

download.title: Run Kerdos natively on your machine.
download.subtitle: Same app, offline-first, menu-bar friendly. Your data stays in a local SQLite file instead of the browser.
download.sourceNote: Prefer the source? Clone the repo or grab a tagged .tar.gz.
download.unsignedWarn: Builds aren't code-signed yet. macOS may say "damaged / unverified" — right-click the app and pick "Open" to bypass Gatekeeper for now.

hero.title: Your wealth, recalculated every minute.
hero.subtitle: The free, local-first tracker. Stocks, crypto, cash, and more — all computed live on your device. No signup. No cloud. No tracking.
hero.caption: Real demo data. Runs fully offline. Your device, your numbers.

privacy.title: Your data never leaves your device.
privacy.subtitle: Three ways to check, not just words on a page.

where.title: Where your data lives
where.body: Stored in IndexedDB on your device. Open DevTools → Application → IndexedDB to see it yourself.

transmit.title: What we receive
transmit.body: Nothing. We don't run servers that see your holdings. Market price requests go to public APIs only.

verify.title: How you verify
verify.body: Open source. Audit the code yourself, or read the one-page privacy policy.

private.headline: Private by default.
private.body: Kerdos stores all your financial data locally on your device. No account required, no server sync, not even us can see it. Your wealth is yours.

coverage.headline: Every asset, one view.
coverage.body: Stocks, crypto, gold, real estate, cash — Kerdos tracks everything. If you own it, Kerdos can value it. Real-time prices where available, manual entry where not.

portability.headline: Your data survives.
portability.body: Kerdos exports to open JSON and CSV formats. No proprietary lock-in. Your net worth history belongs to you, forever — even if we shut down tomorrow.

features.titleLine1: From a single stock to a global portfolio,
features.subtitle: Add your assets once. Watch your net worth update in real time — stocks, crypto, gold, forex, and anything you own manually.
features.demoBadge: Live demo — NVDA, AAPL, BTC, ETH + Bay Area home + Tesla · Prices shown in USD
features.caption: Prices simulate real market volatility — updated every 2.5 seconds. Click any asset to see details.

live.headline: Live prices, always fresh
live.body: US stocks via Yahoo Finance, crypto via CoinGecko, gold via Metals.live — all updated automatically.

calc.headline: Instant calculation
calc.body: Add your holdings once. Kerdos multiplies quantity × live price × exchange rate and keeps your total current.

history.headline: Automatic history
history.body: Kerdos silently saves a daily snapshot of your net worth. Watch it compound over time without any effort.

priceHistory.body1: Kerdos connects directly to free financial APIs from your browser — no intermediary server, no data leakage. Every price call goes from your device straight to the source.
priceHistory.body2: When a source is unavailable, Kerdos falls back automatically. Prices stay fresh. Your net worth stays accurate.

coverage.body1: Most net worth tools only track what they can see via bank APIs. Kerdos is different — you enter what you own, and we value it. Your Shanghai apartment, your gold coins, your BTC cold wallet: all in one number.
coverage.body2: For assets without live prices — real estate, vehicles, art — Kerdos lets you manually set a value. We'll remind you when it's getting stale, so your net worth stays honest.

stats.sources: price sources — all free, no API key needed

social.title: Built in public. Used by builders.

mint.quote: Finally, a Mint replacement that doesn't require me to hand over my bank login. This is exactly what I've been looking for since Mint shut down.
mint.author: @pgfarmer, Hacker News

multi.quote: I have assets in 4 countries across 3 currencies. Kerdos is the first tool that handles all of it, completely offline. The multi-currency conversion alone is worth it.
multi.author: @crypto_nomad_88, Product Hunt

fire.quote: The FIRE community has needed this. Open source, local-first, tracks everything — real estate included. And the dev is responsive on GitHub.
fire.author: @retire_at_40, Reddit r/financialindependence

finalCta.subtitle: Kerdos is free, open source, and runs entirely on your device. No account. No cloud. No compromise.

footer.tagline: Track every asset you own. Runs entirely on your device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Kerdos is a local-first net-worth tracker. The short version: we don't run servers that store your financial data, and the only things that leave your device are anonymous price lookups to public market APIs.

collect.title: 1. What we collect
collect.body: Nothing. Your assets, snapshots, and settings are stored in IndexedDB on your device. We have no account system, no analytics that tie to you, and no telemetry of your holdings.

transmit.title: 2. What we transmit
transmit.body: When you hold assets that have live prices (stocks, crypto, gold, FX), Kerdos fetches quotes directly from public market APIs. These requests contain only the ticker symbols — never your quantities, cost basis, or net worth.

rights.title: 3. Your rights
rights.body: You can delete everything at any time by clearing the Kerdos IndexedDB in your browser (DevTools → Application → IndexedDB → WealthLensDB → delete) or by using Settings → Clear All Data inside the app. There is no server copy to request deletion for, because there is no server copy.

thirdParties.title: 4. Third parties
thirdParties.body: The public market APIs listed above receive only ticker symbols. Their individual privacy terms govern what they log. Kerdos does not embed third-party analytics (no Google Analytics, no Mixpanel, no Segment) on the app itself.

openSource.title: 5. Open source
openSource.body: The entire Kerdos codebase is open source under the MIT license. You can audit exactly what data leaves your device — or build your own version.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.body: Questions, concerns, or something we missed? Open an issue on GitHub. We'll answer publicly.
